$schema: Feature state tracker for nfo-editor. status: planned | in-progress | done | deferred. evidence: commit SHA, PR, or verification note.

features.name: NFO Parser
features.description: parseNfo / serializeNfo with CDATA, ratings, uniqueid, set, fanart, boolean fields

features.name: Single-file metadata editor
features.description: Categorized field editor (Core Info, Plot, Classification, Credits, Production, Identifiers, Media, Advanced)

features.name: Recursive NFO scanning
features.description: scanNfoFiles IPC + FileList UI with SKIP_DIRS filter
features.evidence: electron/main.ts, src/App.tsx, scanDir tests in nfoParser.test.ts

features.name: Browser fallback
features.description: File System Access API path for Chrome/Edge when not in Electron

features.name: Theme system
features.description: Dark / light mode with persistent preference

features.name: Batch actor edit
features.description: Multi-file actor remove / rename / add with fixpoint conflict detection
features.evidence: PR #6 (fd73e59); src/components/BatchEditor.tsx; src/lib/batchOperations.ts; 38 tests in batchOperations.test.ts

features.name: Unknown XML preservation
features.description: parseNfo collects unrecognized top-level elements into data.unknown; serializeNfo re-emits them; cloneNfoData clones them
features.evidence: commit a28d06b; 5 round-trip tests in nfoParser.test.ts; verified on Z:/Media/jellyfin/FC2-スレンダー/お嬢様フルート奏者 (5 files, <art>/<fileinfo>/<website> preserved byte-for-byte)

features.name: Batch edit for genres / tags / studios
features.description: Extend batch edit pattern to flat-string lists (lower complexity than actors)

features.name: Filter / search loaded files by metadata
features.description: Reduce noise when batch-selecting across large folders

features.name: lockdata field surfaced in UI
features.description: Already parsed; show as a per-field lock indicator to prevent accidental overwrite

features.name: E2E renderer tests
features.description: Playwright coverage for select-edit-save and batch flows in App.tsx
